enforced: Directory.Build.props sets AnalysisLevel=latest-all — enables the latest Roslyn analyzer ruleset for build-time analysis, not just IDE-time squiggles
EnforceCodeStyleInBuild=true — .editorconfig csharp_style_*/dotnet_style_* rules run on `dotnet build`, not only `dotnet format`
TreatWarningsAsErrors=true — any analyzer or style violation fails the build (machine-enforced, not advisory)
csharp_prefer_braces, csharp_style_namespace_declarations=file_scoped, and csharp_style_prefer_pattern_matching are machine-enforced style
dotnet_style_readonly_field, dotnet_style_require_accessibility_modifiers, and the interface-naming rule (I-prefix) are machine-enforced
Nullable=enable turns on nullable reference type analysis project-wide
note: Roslyn analyzer diagnostics honor .editorconfig severities on CLI builds under .NET SDK 9+; this baseline relies on in-box analyzers, no NuGet package required.
